versions.verifyHtml:
kubectl get servicetemplates -A
# NAMESPACE    NAME                            VALID
# kcm-system   keycloakx-7-2-0                 true
versions.deployHtml:
apiVersion: k0rdent.mirantis.com/v1beta1
kind: MultiClusterService
metadata:
  name: keycloak
spec:
  clusterSelector:
    matchLabels:
      group: demo
  serviceSpec:
    services:
    - template: keycloakx-7-2-0
      name: keycloakx
      namespace: keycloak
      values: |
        keycloakx:
          command:
            - "/opt/keycloak/bin/kc.sh"
            - "start"
            - "--http-port=8080"
            - "--hostname-strict=false"
          extraEnv: |
            - name: KEYCLOAK_ADMIN
              value: admin
            - name: KEYCLOAK_ADMIN_PASSWORD
              value: admin
            - name: JAVA_OPTS_APPEND
              value: >-
                -Djgroups.dns.query=keycloakx-headless
